name: Ceftizoxime
description: A semisynthetic cephalosporin antibiotic which can be administered intravenously or by suppository. The drug is highly resistant to a broad spectrum of beta-lactamases and is active against a wide range of both aerobic and anaerobic gram-positive and gram-negative organisms. It has few side effects and is reported to be safe and effective in aged patients and in patients with hematologic disorders. [PubChem]
indication: For the treatment of infections due to susceptible strains of microorganisms.
mechanismOfAction: Ceftizoxime is an aminothiazolyl cephalosporin with an extended spectrum of activity against many gram-negative, nosocomially acquired pathogens. It has excellent beta-lactamase stability, with good in vitro activity against Haemophilus influenzae, Neisseria gonorrhoeae and Klebsiella pneumoniae. Ceftizoxime, like the penicillins, is a beta-lactam antibiotic. By binding to specific penicillin-binding proteins (PBPs) located inside the bacterial cell wall, it inhibits the third and last stage of bacterial cell wall synthesis. Cell lysis is then mediated by bacterial cell wall autolytic enzymes such as autolysins; it is possible that ceftizoxime interferes with an autolysin inhibitor.
pharmacodynamics: Ceftizoxime is highly resistant to a broad spectrum of beta-lactamases and is active against a wide range of both aerobic and anaerobic gram-positive and gram-negative organisms. It has few side effects and is reported to be safe and effective in aged patients and in patients with hematologic disorders.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Ceftizoxime.

interactions.name: Picosulfuric acid
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Picosulfuric acid can be decreased when used in combination with Ceftizoxime.

interactions.name: Warfarin
interactions.description: Ceftizoxime may increase the anticoagulant activities of Warfarin.

interactions.name: Dicoumarol
interactions.description: Ceftizoxime may increase the anticoagulant activities of Dicoumarol.

interactions.name: Phenindione
interactions.description: Ceftizoxime may increase the anticoagulant activities of Phenindione.

interactions.name: Phenprocoumon
interactions.description: Ceftizoxime may increase the anticoagulant activities of Phenprocoumon.

interactions.name: Acenocoumarol
interactions.description: Ceftizoxime may increase the anticoagulant activities of Acenocoumarol.

interactions.name: Ethyl biscoumacetate
interactions.description: Ceftizoxime may increase the anticoagulant activities of Ethyl biscoumacetate.

interactions.name: Fluindione
interactions.description: Ceftizoxime may increase the anticoagulant activities of Fluindione.

interactions.name: Clorindione
interactions.description: Ceftizoxime may increase the anticoagulant activities of Clorindione.

interactions.name: Diphenadione
interactions.description: Ceftizoxime may increase the anticoagulant activities of Diphenadione.

interactions.name: Tioclomarol
interactions.description: Ceftizoxime may increase the anticoagulant activities of Tioclomarol.

interactions.name: Probenecid
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Ceftizoxime can be increased when it is combined with Probenecid.
